title: Principal Frontend Developer at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Pimpri-Chinchwad-based team.

About Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions!
